data.title: Circle, Figure, Ripple lead payment businesses to record funding year
data.description:
Payment companies raised $6. 2 billion in 2025, a meteoric rise from the $540 million raised in 2024, as investors bet on blockchain-based financial infrastructure replacing traditional settlement systems. The raises, which represent more than a 1,000% increase from the previous year, were led by stablecoin issuer Circle’s $1. 05 billion initial public offering (IPO). Circle, Figure, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/payment-businesses-record-funding-year/

data.title: Gnosis confirms hard fork to recover funds lost in Balancer hack
data.description:
Gnosis Chain has confirmed that it has executed a hard fork to recover approximately $9. 4 million in funds frozen following the November 2025 Balancer V2 exploit. The hard fork activated on December 22, 2025, and the announcement came the next day via the official Gnosis Chain account. According to the official announcement posted on Gnosis […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gnosis-hard-fork-to-recover-funds/

data.title: Ghana Legalizes Crypto Trading With New VASP Law
data.description:
Ghana has officially legalized cryptocurrency trading after passing the Virtual Asset Service Providers (VASP) Bill, 2025, marking a major shift in the country’s stance on digital assets. The legislation, which became law between December 19 and 22, ends years of regulatory ambiguity and formally brings crypto activity under a national legal framework.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ghana-legalizes-crypto-trading-with-new-vasp-law/

data.title: US To Impose Tariffs On Chinese Chip Imports By Mid-2027
data.description:
US government announced that it will slap tariffs on ​Chinese chip imports over Beijing's "unreasonable" pursuit of chip industry dominance, ‌but would delay the action until June 2027.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/us-to-impose-tariffs-on-chinese-chip-imports-by-mid-2027/
